title: CBIC Issues Implementation Guidelines for Highly Specialized Equipment Exemption
content:
# CBIC Issues Implementation Guidelines for Highly Specialized Equipment Exemption

Ek important update hai! Government ne Highly Specialized Equipment (HSE) ke exemption se related naye implementation guidelines announce kiye hain. Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Instruction No. 08/2026-Customs dated 12.06.2026 ke through in guidelines ko jari kiya hai.

Ye guidelines Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) ke Notification S.O. 1246(E) dated 10.03.2026 ko implement karne ke liye hain, jo "Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Order, 2021" mein amendments lekar aaya hai.

**Key points of the Instruction:**

*   **Effective Date:** Ye naye provisions June 15, 2026 se effective ho jayenge.
*   **Exemption Criteria:** Highly Specialized Equipment (HSE) ko Compulsory Registration Order se exemption milegi agar uski manufacturing ya import 100 units per model per year se kam hai.
*   **Technical Parameters for HSE:** Equipment ko HSE tab mana jayega jab woh niche diye gaye conditions mein se koi ek fulfill karta ho:
    *   Three-phase power supply par chalta ho, OR
    *   Single-phase power supply par chalta ho aur uska current rating 16 amperes se zyada ho, OR
    *   Uski dimensions 1.5 metres x 0.8 metres se zyada ho, OR
    *   Uska weight 80 kilograms se zyada ho.
*   **MeitY Approval:** Is exemption ka benefit lene ke liye MeitY se specific approval lena mandatory hoga.
*   **Objective:** Is move ka aim specialized equipment ki manufacturing aur importation ke regulations ko streamline karna hai, jisse industry compliance strategies par positive impact padega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 14 June 2026*
